account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.7 with Java 17 is possible but prevents access to Spring Boot 3 features and may cause compatibility issues with other upgraded dependencies like Spring Cloud 2023.x.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum supported version; compiling with Java 11 will fail.

account-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.6 to be compatible with Spring Boot 3.3.x.
account-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (Ilford) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.x; using it will result in dependency resolution conflicts or runtime errors due to API changes in Spring Boot 3.
